goal: Keep the main development branch single-track by archiving src_new on a dedicated branch, removing src_new from current branch, and cleaning active config/docs references.
constraints: Do not change runtime logic under src/.
Preserve src_new history via a dedicated archive branch before deletion.
Only clean active-path references; keep historical docs unchanged unless required.
deliverables: Archive branch created for src_new snapshot.
README directory description updated to single active source tree.
